title: Provider Trust Map
one_liner: The model is not the provider. The execution channel is its own trust boundary.
problem: Treating model access as a simple API call hides retention, logging, residency, contractual posture, dependency and supply-chain risk. A capable, trusted model may still be inappropriate through a given provider.
solution: Maintain a provider trust map across data classes, task types, environments and operational privileges. Allowed execution requires task fit AND model trust AND provider trust.
